nodes.label: AI as creative copywriting assistant

nodes.label: AI use in graphic design

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks

nodes.label: AI as tone checker for professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: the AI will try to suggest fun little emoji strings that I believe will fall flat

nodes.label: AI use for personal communication
nodes.grounding_span: I don't let AI handle any of my personal communications

nodes.grounding_span: I look forward to AI taking up my administrative burden

nodes.label: Management enthusiasm for AI

nodes.grounding_span: AI, in these cases, is enabling bad business management

nodes.label: Content quality and accountability
nodes.grounding_span: I am ultimately responsible for any and all content

nodes.label: Intellectual property protection

nodes.label: Skill preservation and professional adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: I have diversified my skills and am good enough at them

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as editing aid
nodes.grounding_span: The best experiences are when I'm stuck trying to improve a conclusion or introduction, and it provides me with a good framework

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: Gemini 2.5 Flash is really bad at coming up with subject lines for emails and particularly puns

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing jobs
nodes.grounding_span: appears to be moving too quickly to replace high-skilled workers with what turns out to be low-quality work

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I look forward to AI taking up my administrative burden

nodes.label: Deliberative review and selective adoption
